description:
All-in-one design tool for everyone

A full-featured screen capture and recording tool, intuitive image editor, color picker, color palette, pixel-ruler, protractor, crosshair, whiteboard and more.
- Added support for saving in WebP file format
- Added horizontal scrolling in the Image Editor with Shift and mouse wheel
- Fixed control capture failing to detect specific windows
- Fixed focus loss during delayed active-window captures.
